creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: danfe
Date: Sat Mar 30 15:47:45 UTC 2019
New revision: 497256
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/497256

Log:
  - Update `www/pound' to version 2.8 and unbreak against
    newish OpenSSL versions [*]
  - Add a handful of useful patches from upstream SRPM
  - Use upstream program description for COMMENT (shorter)
  - Utilize its own installation target and only post-install
    documentation files; install sample configuration file
  - Consummate conversion to option helpers and transfer
    maintainership to the new volunteer

  PR:	234556 [*]

Changes:
  head/www/pound/Makefile
  head/www/pound/distinfo
  head/www/pound/files/0001-Add-MKCALENDAR-to-xHTTP-2-and-above.patch
  head/www/pound/files/0002-add-support-openssl1.1-dhparam.patch
  head/www/pound/files/a2c9dde4d055ea8942afb150b7fc3a807d4e5d60.patch
  head/www/pound/files/c5a95780e2233a05ab3fb8b4eb8a9550f0c3b53c.patch
  head/www/pound/files/patch-Makefile.in
  head/www/pound/files/patch-svc.c
  head/www/pound/files/pound-2.8-fallback_scsv.diff
  head/www/pound/files/pound-2.8-websocket.diff
  head/www/pound/files/pound.cfg.in
